calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2007 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Continued To Feb-05-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Mark J. Romeo, Esq., for Plaintiff: Terry King, present, sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Itemization of Damages-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Survey-Ben Ron-640 Hayes St.-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Photo-Exterior Repairs July'05-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Photo-Exterior Temporary Repair----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 5---Photo-Interior 640 Hayes-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 6---Photo-Interior 640 Hayes-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 7---Photo-Exterior 640 Hayes-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 8---Declaration of Ray McCaskey in support of
Application for Default Judgment---------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff: Terry King and against the Defaulted Defendant: Matteo M. Garbelotto, as follows:
Damages $126,795.44
Prejudgment Interest $3,988.39
Costs $502.50, for a total of $131,286.33
Right to the property located at 640-642 Hayes St., San Francisco, CA.
(See scanned document for details of the judgment and of the subject property.)
Judgment pending Plaintiff's filing of a dismissal as to does 1-100.

P.M.
Judgment signed by Comm. Sue Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-26-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
